seoTitle: Ebbw Vale vs Edens Landing — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ebbw Vale and Edens Landing. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ebbw Vale vs Edens Landing: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ebbw Vale and Edens Landing.
heading: Ebbw Vale vs Edens Landing — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ebbw Vale, Queensland and Edens Landing, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Edens Landing has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Ebbw Vale (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ebbw Vale or Edens Landing safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ebbw Vale has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Edens Landing scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ebbw Vale scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Edens Landing scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ebbw Vale or Edens Landing?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Edens Landing has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
